levels.name: troll level
levels.creator: lexycat & more
levels.description: The gameplay feels like a medium demon after you learn it, the learning process is what makes this level seem like an extreme demon. Yes, because once I learned the level it LITERALLY felt as hard as Deadlocked, I know it might seem stupid, but this is too easy for an extreme demon, acu is literally barely extreme demon, troll level is super easy relative to acu. It's extremely accessible, even to players who haven't beaten anything harder than Theory of Skrillex. Once you learn it, you know how to do it and it's very consistent. All levels requires learning. I would agree with how people view the difficulty of kilbot because the deco makes the level harder with the gameplay being already hard, but troll level doesn't even feel like a memory level once you learn it, it feels deadlocked difficulty, and deadlocked also requires learning when trying to beat it. still, I can beat this level and a medium demon within a day, while real extreme demons would take me longer than a month and insane demons would take me from 2 days to a week. It seriously feels too easy for an extreme demon, like compare this level to a level like acu, acu is already barely an extreme demon yet troll level is still A LOT easier. And to finish it off I beat mnny medium demons and I did troll level in 2 runs, 86% and 37-100%, and I did some other extreme demons in 3-2 runs, so I am allowed to have an opinion. Different people think it's different difficulty, if you are bad at memorizing levels this level would be like a high end insane demon in my opinion, and if you are good at memorizing level this level is like medium demon. The memory aspect doesn't make this level an extreme demon because look at Sword Dance, it has memory and hard and akward timings, not to mention there is a 2 frame timing at 73%, yet its still a high end insane demon, you can't really compare them both because Sword Dance is a lot harder, play both for yourself, you'll see what I mean

levels.creator: IcEDCave & more
levels.description: Basically Devil Vortex but blue with the fucked up waves and all. Ranges from easier than Sonic Wave to harder than Tartarus, depends on who you ask

levels.name: Fog
levels.creator: notesxd & more
levels.description: Generally well received fast timings map with a unique randomized ending. It's very foggy, and you're in a storm for most of the level

levels.name: Fragmented
levels.creator: Cersia & sink
levels.description: 1.9 GDPS level with a very difficult first half and overall awkward gameplay throughout. Has been swapped with Calamity like a million times

levels.name: FRIDAY
levels.creator: Metalface221
levels.description: Solo level that pays tribute to Woogi's decoration style and a lot of his specific decoration styles. It plays like one too; whether that's good or bad is up to you

levels.name: Frozen Cave
levels.creator: TrueParadoxTeam
levels.description: Well-received and energetic snow-themed collab (that uses a Halloween song???) you might recognize for the iconic toggle orb ship avalanche part

levels.name: Gracefully
levels.creator: NindyBK & more
levels.description: A more polished remake of hit former UDL mainstay Graceful, but it's still pretty janky despite being a recipient of 2 balance updates. Very rainbow

levels.name: Gustavo Fring
levels.creator: Renn241 & Kutsu
levels.description: An interesting twist to Renn's Breaking Bad series, however the very previous-click-based nature of the gameplay can be frustrating and inconsistent

levels.name: Hardry
levels.creator: KuraiYonaka
levels.description: Design level with lots of ass-clenching timings and ship parts

levels.name: Iris of a Puppeteer
levels.creator: EternaswipVMAX & IcEDCave
levels.description: CONGRATULATIONS YOU WIN A FREE TRIP STRAIGHT TO [[Hell]]!!!

levels.name: IthacropoliX
levels.creator: BIGMAC77 & more
levels.description: Ithacropolis if it was way longer, way harder, and a glow megacollab. Thankfully keeps the city

levels.name: Knights of Thunder
levels.creator: HangerLord
levels.description: Glow/design level in HangerLord's typical style. Features a lot of difficult ships and waves, and is shockingly well received for what it is

levels.name: kowareta
levels.creator: Gablor & more
levels.description: Formerly the shortest extreme demon, comprised of messy, spike-filled decoration and claustrophobic gameplay with a 120fps frame perfect green orb as the first click

levels.name: MewneI
levels.creator: LightINovel
levels.description: 2.2 level with over 600 hours of creating time inspired from Star vs. the Forces of Evil & Date a Live. Takes a while to learn, made harder with many blind transitions and shaders

levels.name: Nhelv
levels.creator: SrGuillester & more
levels.description: Extremely high-quality memory masterpiece famous for its amazing interpretation of the music video for the song it uses, as well as its very uniquely structured gameplay

levels.name: Ouroboros
levels.creator: ViPriN & more
levels.description: Iconic purple/orange GeoStorm level with deco that progressively gets better as it goes on and very polarizing gameplay

levels.name: Ourwa
levels.creator: Demishio
levels.description: Solo level from early 2.1 that took forever to get rated. Contains tons of very unique gameplay and design decisions, giving it immense amounts of character

levels.name: Pagoda
levels.creator: Seturan & more
levels.description: Korean megacollab with lots of designs, ships, waves, lots of very difficult timings, and a super well-liked song

levels.name: Plasma Pulse Finale
levels.creator: xSmokes & Giron
levels.description: The final level of the Plasma Pulse series with a much harder, slower, and more skill based second half (basically the complete opposite of the first). Harder than Bloodlust

levels.name: Ploink
levels.creator: Goobfrudla
levels.description: Goofy and colorful level with a cheery feel that was surprisingly verified by Wooshi999. Twinkx Hardest Demon

levels.name: Pootis Engage XTREME
levels.creator: AAAAAlex
levels.description: Surprisingly well received 1.9 memory level with a large variety of designs throughout despite being barely a minute long. Sequel to Pootis Engage by the same creator

levels.name: PROTON LAUNCHER
levels.creator: Multiverse55 & TysonGD
levels.description: ATOMIC CANNON inspired Australian level, full of silly chokepoints and very high CPS gameplay

levels.name: RAM
levels.creator: James & Jimmies
levels.description: Very high-quality megacollab themed around a gaming PC becoming corrupted and thus trying to destroy itself. Also completely unrelated to the Daft Punk album (1993-2021)

levels.name: ROCKY ROAD
levels.creator: arclightt & cdyzz
levels.description: Timings-focused click sync level with bright rainbow colors and simple ATOMIC CANNON-inspired decoration. Due to a nerfdate prior to rate, the second half is a bit easier

levels.name: Sazerix
levels.creator: Zeptrus
levels.description: Much harder sarthix sequel set almost entirely in 4x speed all the way through. Carried incredibly hard by two difficult waves but to make up for it the level literally ends at like 80%

levels.name: Shutdown
levels.creator: OliSW
levels.description: Themed around a Flood Escape 2 map under the same name. Switches between cold/hot colors everytime there's a new part, also the first ship/wave is extremely hard

levels.name: Sigma
levels.creator: MindCap & more
levels.skillset: Learny, nerve control, those who know
levels.description: The second and hardest entry to the Greek letter trilogy. Features lots of janky learny 2019 gameplay and zero brainrot

levels.name: SZYSLAK
levels.creator: Zeniux & zZeusGD
levels.description: Very tight level with lots of strange duals and gameplay choices, especially the dual miniwave spam right before the drop

levels.name: Th3Dev0n
levels.creator: Zeptoz
levels.description: Extremely unbalanced green memory level carried by two waves that are probably harder than the rest of the gameplay combined. Tragically not made by TheDevon

levels.name: the wiener
levels.creator: rynoxious & more
levels.description: Somewhat challenging demon that contains the most unhinged structuring to match The Penis (Eek!). Unsurprisingly, the hardest part is the wave

levels.name: The Yandere
levels.creator: Dorami & more
levels.description: Ancient ass Dorami top 10 verification "themed" around the similarly named Super Game (there is a factory part with a fursona wearing sunglasses blocking half the screen)

levels.name: Twilight
levels.creator: zYuko
levels.description: Very flowery Yuko level (much like most Yuko levels) with a twilight (purple, blue, orange, all that jazz) color scheme and some DASTARDLY waves

levels.name: untitled unmastered
levels.creator: para
levels.description: Built in under 1000 objects. You could probably tell by how it looks, and especially how it plays. Unaffiliated with Kendrick Lamar

levels.name: Visible Ray
levels.creator: KrampuX & more
levels.description: Former top 3 megacollab that's basically the pinnacle of Korean vibes where everyone just went batshit crazy and did whatever. Lots of very silly transitions throughout

levels.name: XRAY
levels.creator: GDSkele & more
levels.description: Unofficial take on the Infrared series with a very iconic lineup of creators. Was verified in 2.2 with (now fixed) 2.2 bugs. Beware of the ending

levels.name: Akashic Records
levels.creator: VoTcHi & more
levels.description: Korean megacollab famous for its high variance in decoration styles, quality, and gameplay polish. Was rated after RobTop joined a RicoLP stream and he told him about the level

levels.name: Amalgam
levels.creator: XLSpiral
levels.description: Basically 4 wave challenges stitched together with some filler gameplay and a predrop slapped on. The difficulty opinions are about as bad as you would expect

levels.name: Asterios
levels.creator: Exen & more
levels.description: PRAISE THE SUN!!! Ancient dual based level with a notoriously cruel ending section. Has random flashes of laggy space art as well as lots of spinny things

levels.name: BarbarosFinaleFinale
levels.creator: awesomeme360 & more
levels.description: Barbaros Finale remake infected with the shmigels virus. Makes for a really funny level, some wacky imported gameplay, and Barbaros becoming TOO powerful

levels.name: Bloodlust
levels.creator: Knobbelboy & more
levels.description: Legendary former top 1 remake of Bloodbath. Adds a slow ship at the beginning that's like being under anaesthesia but also an extremely nerve-racking extension. Easier than PPF

levels.name: Call Me Maybe
levels.creator: nothawkyre & more
levels.description: Very pink level humorously using the Carly Rae Jepsen song that went unrated for 3+ years. Enjoyed by many, but still about as initially well received as a 2022 LVC verification was

levels.name: Cobwebs
levels.creator: NineDice
levels.description: The shortest extreme demon, relying on the typical challenge skillsets. The name describes the theme. Would actually be Short length if it weren't for the endscreen. Married to Eon

levels.name: Coral Cave
levels.creator: awesomeme360 & Gnamolor
levels.description: Sonic Rush Adventure-themed level with surprising amounts of gamemode blips and CPS in a few parts. Has a CBF blocker that makes you wait at the endscreen for an hour

levels.name: Deep Bass
levels.creator: Wespdx & Spectruh
levels.description: The official sequel to Down Bass, opting to use the brightest 0, 0, 255 blue possible. Gameplay is similarly fucked up, going all out on the spams in Spectruh's part

levels.name: Descent Into Exile
levels.creator: GrenadeOfTacos & more
levels.description: Extremely edgy Riot 1.9 themed level with very poor balancing. This level also has the most detailed "DIE" anyone has ever seen

levels.name: DsinK
levels.creator: stanstanmansan & more
levels.description: Double meaning name water themed level that went through years of development hell, originally an abandoned crohn44 project. The dual at 36% is especially terrifying to learn

levels.name: Excruciation Chamber
levels.creator: spcreat
levels.description: A remake of the popular challenge "Torture Chamber" by UFWM, turning it into an entire level with very wave-themed decoration. Can you guess what the main gamemode is?

levels.name: Escape Room
levels.creator: SleyGD
levels.description: Sley design venture with sleek, tech-y dungeon theming. Gameplay is claustrophobic and stressful to match

levels.name: FARBIDI THEORY
levels.creator: TMco
levels.description: Hinds-style remake of Theory of Everything with a pretty nasty swing part at the end. Verifier describes it as “the ultimate filler level”.

levels.name: Gloxinia
levels.creator: solarion & more
levels.description: Half-korean megacollab that features a bunch of old creators mixed with more active creators making for a wild card of styles throughout the parts

levels.name: Jesse Pinkman
levels.creator: Renn241
levels.description: Pretty obvious speedbuild with Renn's signature gameplay style. Had a death saw at 98% on the LDM that nobody noticed for months because the level is so empty nobody used it

levels.name: Jupiter My Favourite
levels.creator: Akunakunn
levels.description: Blue and yellow memory level themed around stars containing a terrifying mini wave and a signature evil last ship. "This is Akunakuns least favourite planet" -The Onion

levels.name: Kappa
levels.creator: Armadeus & more
levels.description: The Greek Letter Trilogy's oddball cousin, with gameplay vaguely reminiscent of Gamma. Also took a couple years to get rated for some reason. Funny twitch emote

levels.name: Launchpad Labyrinth
levels.creator: Moffe
levels.description: Wario Land-themed level that plays like a total shitpost. The slow gameplay and the ridiculous chokepoints (notably the wave gravity portal scrongler) make this evident

levels.name: LD50
levels.creator: StarkyTheSalad, ryli06, paqoe
levels.description: Extremely learny level with a very trippy style that took 30+ sends to get rated. Has a lot of wacky duals and a really neat gimmick with colorful blocks you're not supposed to touch

levels.name: Lucid Nightmares
levels.creator: CairoX & DonutTV
levels.description: VERY old Divine Demon that was the second hardest verified level at the time. Has very all-around gameplay and is infamous for its Dentistcore music

levels.name: meow hard
levels.creator: meowdead & more
levels.description: Clicksync-based 1.9 gdps level with some very impressive designs, and yet it had nothing to do with the insane demon or cats. SAD!

levels.name: Moving Forward
levels.creator: crohn44
levels.description: A Crohn'd up white boy that has something to do with moving and construction. You must initiate a blood pact with the Antichrist in order to beat this level

levels.name: Nabil Let Go
levels.creator: nabbbbbb & more
levels.description: A fairly standard 1.9 GDPS level with some challenging waves, a really neat art part at the end, and a Jeff the Killer cameo

levels.name: no jokes
levels.creator: TheParadoxTeam
levels.description: The former shortest extreme in the game, known for its serious predrop followed by peak silliness. Has very chokepointy gameplay and a gnarly wave at 66%

levels.name: NYUTOPIA
levels.creator: Tornabro
levels.description: Very sick level that's very short, jam-packed with timings, and inspired by Icedcave's Stellar Night (and rated before it). Very gay

levels.name: obsession
levels.creator: jbooster
levels.description: Multicolored, flashy themed level that sounds the idea of being obsessed. Obsessed with what you may ask? No one knows. Also this level has funky duals so beware

levels.name: Omega Interface
levels.creator: Platnuu & Zipixbox
levels.description: The finale of the Interface trilogy. This one is a bit different from its predecessors in structure, still in Platnuu's signature insanely clean decoration style

levels.name: Pandemonium
levels.creator: Cersia & more
levels.description: 1.9 hell themed level that's consistently average in visuals and oddly has not changed the NONG for Infertehno 2. Forgettable aside from pushing Bloodlust out of the top 100

levels.name: Ragnarok
levels.creator: Knobbelboy & more
levels.description: Megacollab that remains well-respected despite its obvious age, as well as quirkiness and goofy balancing. Famous for its money shots at 0% and 98%

levels.name: RUST
levels.creator: neigefeu
levels.description: Timing level well-known for its 𝑔𝓇𝒾𝓉𝓉𝓎 (not rustic this was made VERY clear) decoration style, heavy affinity for double clicks, and extremely stressful ending

levels.name: RUTHLESS
levels.creator: SurJaco & more
levels.description: Very much unlike its prequel, this has a lot of vibrant realism deco, a long predrop, and weird ass duals. Who would've known this would follow up RELENTLESS of all levels?

levels.name: SAND SAILOR
levels.creator: Custi & ked
levels.description: Creative and colorful art level with some of the most brutal learning curves you'll find in any level ever. The predrop is Triple Spike Hell, and it was also made far harder by 2.2

levels.name: Sank
levels.creator: Waterbound
levels.description: All-cube aquatic-themed solo timings level heavily inspired by Dump and DsinK. It has SpongeBob characters and some nice cubecopter :)

levels.name: Shardscapes
levels.creator: ItzKiba
levels.description: Entirely robot level that loves corner jumps and funky orb timings. Only really has two parts, the predrop and drop, but both of them are pretty cool with lots of atmosphere

levels.name: SUPERHATEMEWORLD
levels.creator: IcEDCave & more
levels.description: Like the name suggests, and as you could probably tell, this was designed to be as unfun as possible. It achieved its goal, and yet still got a surplus of victors due to its nature

levels.name: Terminux
levels.creator: Aerae & more
levels.description: Eternal Moment sequel with fixed hitboxes and a very unbalanced predrop, however, it is very pretty. Slow wave jumpscare

levels.name: The Art of the Blade
levels.creator: mbed & more
levels.description: Infamous GD Civilization level known for its memory combination and having to notice specific marks throughout the level. If youre going for this and need help heres a key

levels.name: the ocean of fish
levels.creator: shmigels
levels.description: Aptly named ocean levle with a unique approach to art, forming marine life out of blocks and spikes. Quite quirky gameplay (albeit a bit less than usual) that nicely complements the song

levels.name: The Rupture
levels.creator: Ka1ns
levels.description: Ancient list demon loosely based on one of the most popular insane demons, beware of the hardest yellow orb at the very end

levels.name: TORN
levels.creator: Kyhros & more
levels.description: Slow tech themed level that never exceeds 5 cps. Very ending carried, with the waves at the end being big chokepoints

levels.name: X84
levels.creator: XavT
levels.description: XavT level that, much like his other works, is a very fast-paced flow level. It's full of his trademark chaotic deco style and is a recipient of the ever-elusive Wolvez 10/10.

levels.name: Ykds1479ymdppr
levels.creator: Kapycta999
levels.description: For Whom The Bell Tolls. The 2nd Kapycta keyspam level featuring the same type of gameplay as Kjdf, just with harder gameplay, a brutal last click, and a minor spillage of bells

levels.name: Ascent
levels.creator: Rimexon & more
levels.description: Green glow level with Aspects. Has a sorta corridor-y gameplay structuring style. Contains the most laggy unfitting endscreen since Ballistic Funk. COOL

levels.name: ATOMIC CANNON Mk II
levels.creator: LIEB, Giron, & BIANOX
levels.description: More of the ATOMIC CANNON formula we all know and love. Thankfully, this one chills out a lot in the predrop. Has a rinky-dinky-ass wave

levels.name: Axiom Asterism
levels.creator: Filqh & fusion425
levels.description: Official sequel to Infinite Inversion that kinda resembles The Hallucination, mostly with the structuring of the drop with its many similar gamemode switches and teleports.

levels.name: Calculator Core
levels.creator: Walroose & more
levels.description: Kenos/Bloodlust/Keres style rebirth of Artificial Ideology. Shockingly clean for how old it is, as well as keeping the gameplay similarly weird in its extension

levels.name: Cognition
levels.creator: EndLevel & benji8080
levels.description: Famously claustrophobic level known for its plethora of late orb timings, as well as unique song choice. Dark lemon

levels.name: CORRODERE
levels.creator: Moosh & more
levels.description: Very clean design megacollab that's surprisingly little-known despite its stacked roster, most notable for Kiba's generational Fat Wave

levels.name: Cosmic Cyclone
levels.creator: APTeamOfficial
levels.description: The official sequel to Sonic Wave, with much more refined visuals and many intense, lengthy bursts of 4x wave gameplay. See publisher for more info about endscreen length

levels.name: ConClusion
levels.creator: DreamZoneGD
levels.description: The finale to DreamZoneGD 'con-' trilogy, taking all the effects and designs an entire level further. Remember to keep your sanity!

levels.name: Crimson Planet
levels.creator: TrueOmega & more
levels.description: Iconic former top 1, unsurprisingly hell-themed and has fairly janky gameplay, but is still iconic nonetheless. Don't exit out!

levels.name: DIRECTIONS
levels.creator: wokecat & Nightning
levels.description: Beautiful mystical level that LOVES slope gameplay. I counted: before the drop, you only land on a flat surface one time. The entire drop is fast, learny, and mirrored, so watch out

levels.name: Disconnected Descent
levels.creator: TheSkeletonGMD & more
levels.description: Classic design-styled level using blue, orange and red tints with fast-paced clicksync gameplay

levels.name: Disordered Stars
levels.creator: Javixed4 & more
levels.description: Very rainbow level heavily inspired by Spectrum Cyclone, but this time it uses a Bossfight song and is a lot harder. How quaint!

levels.name: Dry Out Copyable 2
levels.creator: tenzk & more
levels.description: Long and highly eclectic megacollab that you can tell these people had a blast making. Applies a tasteful amount of 2.2 features, not much beyond occasional bulgeshots

levels.name: Frost Spirit
levels.creator: Quaybus & more
levels.description: Ice-themed 1.9 GDPS map that uses a Roblox Tower Defense Simulator song. Very nerve-y. Every part was made by Quaybus

levels.name: Indivine
levels.creator: Mercury6779 & more
levels.description: Bomb-ass rainbow Nine Circles(?) level that was in development for a WHILE and has insane aura. Really cool level you should play it

levels.name: Instinct
levels.creator: KrmaL & more
levels.description: Unofficial sequel to Valor/Mystic that keeps the unpolished nature of the series. Gained notoriety for knocking Bloodlust into the extended list and Sonic Wave into this spreadsheet

levels.name: Neon Skyline
levels.creator: reshiria
levels.description: Colorful city-themed level with immaculate vibes. Rough around the edges, as is its gameplay, but the song and decoration combo make this one of the friendliest levels out there

levels.name: Promethean
levels.creator: EndLevel & more
levels.description: Plays more like multiple challenges stringed together than an actual level if anything. One of the Great Unflukeables, Beware of the last ship

levels.name: qoUEO
levels.creator: GhostVandalf
levels.description: Wave challenge with a side of gameplay, and bad gameplay at that. Has a really cool vibe to it if you enjoy Watching

levels.name: Renevant
levels.creator: nikroplays
levels.description: Allegiance sequel almost entirely carried by various chokepoints. Regardless, it still stays true to the original with the limited visibility effect and all

levels.name: Rigel
levels.creator: Dan2D
levels.description: Very fast nine circles level with high-tech design and some dope space backgrounds. Had a pretty large nerfdate, which reduced many annoying chokepoints

levels.name: Ringy Paracosm
levels.creator: GDNachoo
levels.description: Formerly one of the hardest verified NC levels that went under the radar for nearly 4 years. Vaguely themed around Bracelety from BFDI

levels.name: SARY NEVER CLEAR
levels.creator: IIKugelBlitZII & more
levels.description: Remake of a former impossible level with a much harder 2nd half featuring various chokepoints, such as the infamous quads and an invisible ship ending. Also contains lots of silly text

levels.name: Scrubbabingo force
levels.creator: Akunakunn & Shubhy
levels.description: Chaotic evil superbuffed Hexagon Force memory remake ("Quantum Force" if you will) with desynced duals and the classic Akunakun impossible ship ending

levels.name: shimmer
levels.creator: amplitron
levels.description: The hardest rated level built for Zeronium CC1, with it placing decently high for that. Has extremely click-heavy gameplay and some of the tightest waves you'll see in Extended

levels.name: Sky Shredder
levels.creator: Dorvict
levels.description: Average 1.9 GDPS level that was built solo and named after a tower upgrade in BTD6. Despite this, you do not appear to be in the sky at any point in the level

levels.name: ta1LSD0ll
levels.creator: ta1lsdoll
levels.description: Short level with extremely noisy decoration and a difficult wave section for the entire drop. Might as well be a memory level with how hard to see it is. Don't wait on the title screen......

levels.name: Thinking Space
levels.creator: HidekiX
levels.description: Old impossible level from 2.0 that has an extremely hard second half. No coin victors will be executed, no exceptions

levels.name: Trotil
levels.creator: cherryteam
levels.description: Glass-themed (not ice-themed!) Cherryteam level with a lot of nasty waves. Was made by fairly new CherryTeamers so it's less refined than your average Cherry affair.

levels.name: Xenolith
levels.creator: Zisthik & more
levels.description: Excruciatingly orange flow level that went unrated for a while (and never got to be a list demon. SAD!). Uses that one KORAII song that samples Mario Judah. I'm a big dog big bear

levels.name: Ambidexter
levels.creator: TestFiles
levels.description: A 2-player level where you're racing against a strict timer. Requires ambidextrous control using six keys at once - rumored to be harder solo than Codependence.

levels.name: Cobweb
levels.creator: DustyBud
levels.description: An avoidance style level where you have to weave between the threads of a randomly generated cobweb every second, with each new web gaining 1 thread. Complete all 100 webs to win.

levels.name: DETERNARY
levels.creator: TheRealXFuture
levels.description: A ternary computation machine inside Geometry Dash. Has a full documentation of information on the 5 tasks needed to beat this. Have fun coding :3

levels.name: dusty travel
levels.creator: Galaxxyss
levels.description: Procedurally generated Desert Bus styled level spanning 5 - 6 hours, making it the longest rated level in the game. Features 50+ random events, some of which can kill you

levels.name: ENTANGLEMENT
levels.creator: TheRealXFuture
levels.description: 2 player snake. Get both snakes to a length of 25 to win. The meaning is up to interpretation. "Intended for solo play." (Nobody is playing this solo)

levels.name: Hexagonestestestest
levels.creator: Enlightenment
levels.description: A spinoff remake of Super Hexagon that requires the player to survive eight minutes of increasingly difficult gameplay, with a checkpoint every minute. The coin is deathless

levels.name: 4imu
levels.creator: Orelu
levels.description: A virus-infected Windows XP styled -imu level with square hitboxes. Features some funny references in the task windows such as Vortrox typing "Gullible" into the Wraith's vault.

levels.name: Archipelago
levels.creator: HumanBeing99999
levels.description: A very long slope based level 5 distinct sections, all with some gimmick tied to them. Gimmicks include but are not limited to: double orbs, arrow triggers, and an axolotl gamemode.

levels.name: axium
levels.creator: ComodoQc
levels.description: Chill slopeboosting level where you have to return a book, and get some nice decoration to look at. Features a lot of spikes on slopes

levels.name: Beatpulse
levels.creator: NDagger
levels.description: Every checkpoint in this level is followed by hard, often stupid gameplay, most of them under a timer based on the song that goes a lot faster than you may expect

levels.name: Cimu
levels.creator: perpori
levels.description: One of many -imus, this one featuring gameplay reminiscent of several other levels in its 3 sections, but with perfectly circular hitboxes and low gravity.

levels.name: Coldest Winter Yet
levels.creator: nnexterr
levels.description: A winter-themed foddian-style level about slope boosting and icy slopes. Cheerful penguins try to motivate you, but the frustrating gameplay turns a good day worse. Don't break your fingers on the last slope.

levels.name: Creepy Needle
levels.creator: CreatorCreepy
levels.description: Unplaytested standard needle gameplay. Specifically crafted for thearmyants to not like the level, didn't work out well... (Creepy Quote: "You know where you are? You're in the jungle baby. You're gonna die.")

levels.name: Death of the Divine
levels.creator: vLibra
levels.description: Learn how to fight and beat a stray demigoddess. Good Luck! The used song was specifically made for this level by the creator itself.

levels.name: ECSTASIS
levels.creator: dkitey
levels.description: The 3rd part in dkitey's series of low gravity platformers, with pretty art styled decoration depicting a journey through the sky at different times of day, Gameplay is mostly silly hitbox abuse

levels.name: Entrenched
levels.creator: easymode
levels.description: Robot needle platformer with a deep sea atmosphere. Has an annoying slope part and a stupidly hard chase sequence at the end

levels.name: ETERNAL ENDING
levels.creator: No ob
levels.description: A very early 2.2 platformer extreme known for its very short length and the entire difficulty basically consisting of 2 chokepoints, them being a blue orb tripple click and a stupid one block cube gap you have to fall into.

levels.name: Facility Collapse
levels.creator: NewSakePlayS
levels.description: The sequel to the Insane Demon "Reactor Meltdown". This one is much more energetic and fast-paced. Also has a randomized jetpack section in the middle break part.

levels.name: Facility Escape
levels.creator: MatejWGD
levels.description: Nuclear Alarm inspired room level using every gamemode in platformer mode, culminating in a speedrun to the exit. Randomly got rated over a year after its verification.

levels.name: FURY OF 500
levels.creator: Split72 & more
levels.description: Basically How to platformer but it trades room count for difficulty of the rooms themselves. Guess how many rooms it has. You're wrong, it's 514

levels.name: Give Up II
levels.creator: LudiumGD
levels.description: Room level that gets much harder by the last 5 rooms and ends with a Celeste style beatblock challenge. Has the same microclick timing 88 times lo

levels.name: Iliobasilema
levels.creator: KATALYSM
levels.description: Generously inspired by Aquanemesis and by the creator of the "beloved" Mesabisos. The parts near the middle are the hardest however the ending carries some rather wacky timings.

levels.name: Intersummisse
levels.creator: MaddyGMD
levels.description: Celeste inspired precision level thats a far easier sequel to Intervallum. Features three very long checkpoints, making the last few jumps of them incredibly stressful.

levels.name: Kebnekaise
levels.creator: OliSW
levels.description: The first epic rated platformer extreme. It's a tall Jump King-esque level, with an oddly sensitive stun mechanic and all. The name is pronounced kebb-neh-kai-seh according to cadrega hopefully she's right

levels.name: Lacertus
levels.creator: waterpump
levels.description: A roguelike with many different weapons, randomized dungeons, unique bosses, and a 10-minute time limit to prepare for the final fight. It culminates in an extremely well-animated multi-phase battle against Lacertus.

levels.name: Mammoth Mountain
levels.creator: oleki
levels.description: A glorified decorated ball challenge. Has a moving saw wall that chases you at a snail's pace and is only longer a minute due to the multiple times the level forces you to wait. The entire level could fit on a single screen with 0.6x zoom.

levels.name: Mesabisos
levels.creator: KATALYSM
levels.description: Notable only for sounding like a rare variant of cancer. Needle level with very long checkpoints and rather basic decoration

levels.name: Noir
levels.creator: Dxshing
levels.description: Fairly standard autoscroller with various gamemodes and 3 sections with different deco, with some timers implemented for pace keeping.

levels.name: Oh God No
levels.creator: CeakGD
levels.description: Bossfight level where you have 90 seconds to hit the boss 25 times. He has 5 randomly generated attacks. YOU THOUGHT KOOPA WORKED ALONE?

levels.name: Overdrive
levels.creator: IvanCrafter026 & iownfish
levels.description: 3rd level in Ivan's speedrun trilogy, this one is a very haphazardly structured race against the clock, featuring no spikes or saws. Surprisingly solid music sync for a platformer

levels.name: Pimu
levels.creator: burningmagma
levels.description: Uhm Huh if it was good. Cube/robot level that is pretty much entirely composed of fixed-hitbox circles, sorta like the ball part in ECSTASIS but it's just a regular deathless level otherwise

levels.name: Possible Boy
levels.creator: ThiKn
levels.description: Super Meat Boy inspired level where you only get 10 lives to complete 4 rooms of gameplay consisting of wall jumps, precision and jank wind propellers.

levels.name: Qimu
levels.creator: burningmagma
levels.description: Pimu sequel with the same gameplay style, but with checkpoints this time. Features a white and black robot part, a greenish ball part and a nighty cube part. At least I dont copy a Pimu like Qimu

levels.name: Robot King
levels.creator: GDgalaxygaming & more
levels.description: Yet another "you can't die but you can fall all the way back to the beginning" directly mimicking Jump King, thankfully this one is rather forgiving with its falls

levels.name: Sleep
levels.creator: iownfish
levels.description: An utterly bizarre hodgepodge of feverish, dreamlike environments alongside perplexing gimmicks such as advanced follow trigger death orbs and a Wall of Flesh chase sequence for some reason ???

levels.name: Steelworks Bounce
levels.creator: JH1235
levels.description: 4 rooms of gameplay with an accurate recreation of the physics as well as select items, hazards, and special block types from the original Bouncy Ball game by RAON GAMES.

levels.name: The Savannah Citadel
levels.creator: IcyWindy
levels.description: A sufficiently quirky deathless level taking you on a journey through the savannah. Was initially unrated due to being verified with CBF despite it already accumulating legit victors at the time

levels.name: The SMR Collection
levels.creator: gr8ness & more
levels.description: The (self-described) sloppiest slopformer to ever slop, featuring 25 rooms ranging from standard platforming and puzzles to chess, chores, Peggle, and more. Most timers are fake

levels.name: The Tower XXII
levels.creator: o1iv3
levels.description: Technically the first rated platformer extreme after IWBTG got demoted. Hastily made and inspired by a Celeste Strawberry Jam map. The timings get pretty vicious near the end

levels.name: Throat of the World
levels.creator: thejshadow & MoistenedEgg
levels.description: The first mythic extreme. Split into 6 sections with coin-related side quests and 2 bosses. Heavily based on slopes and coyote jumps in spite of each section having a different gimmick

levels.name: Timu
levels.creator: Moonix37
levels.description: Low gravity precision level in the same vein as the rest of the -imu series, this time using square hitboxes and with a factory theme similar to rimu. The difficulty is carried by microclicks.

levels.name: Whoopsie Gravy
levels.creator: FarAwayLand
levels.description: A Jump King-style level only utilizing the ball. Watch out for the Xs, they'll paralize you for a second and make you drop down! Heavenburnsred

levels.name: Bimu
levels.creator: 23jabeln
levels.description: Yet another imu level with decoration inspired by the Blue Rift levels from A Hat in Time. Watch out for the purple platforms that move at mach speed.

levels.name: Bouncy Ball
levels.creator: lappwv
levels.description: Incredibly buggy and skip-filled, but the skips get patched constantly while the bugs remain. Utilizes a very strange gimmick where you are, in fact, a Bouncy Ball

levels.name: Current Current
levels.creator: Crerro
levels.description: It’s currently raining while spikes currently rise and currents currently surge - stay current with the current, or you’re currently doomed!

levels.name: DASHER
levels.creator: xParallels
levels.description: A vibrantly colored dash orb level inspired by creators known for their dash orb gameplay like qalli and rtnman. Has lots of very short checkpoints until the last one, which spans 30 whole seconds.

levels.name: echos du silence
levels.creator: ComodoQc
levels.description: ECSTASIS 2. Same style of gameplay, the only thing setting both levels apart is that this level is set entirely at night with less modern designs.

levels.name: Fimu
levels.creator: iownfish
levels.description: Stands for Fish Imu. Has 3 sections: an UFO, a cube, and a robot. Obstacles mostly consist of bubbles with some other random sea creatures scattered among them. Don't die to the crab...

levels.name: FRUSTRATION
levels.creator: Jeyzor
levels.description: Recreation of an old Flash game called Platform Racing 2 using 2p controls and having expectedly wonky physics. Split into 4 zones with distinct gimmicks. Read the note

levels.name: gallery
levels.creator: 2ItalianCats
levels.description: A level incorporating many scrapped designs by the creator. Consists of three parts with various gimmicks and a constant moving platform you have to keep up with.

levels.name: Labyrinth
levels.creator: tricipital + more
levels.description: A rogue-lite platformer made entirely in GD. Journey through ever-changing, destructible worlds and unravel the hidden mysteries of the Labyrinth. Good luck finding the exit, you'll need it.

levels.name: LIMU
levels.creator: Splash225 & WatehRY
levels.description: A Pimu inspired level with 4 sections, half robot and half jetpack. Despite it not making very much sense to keep the low gravity at the jetpack, this level does it anyway

levels.name: Myrce
levels.creator: perpori & WatehRY
levels.description: A very visually pleasing speedrun level, mostly decorated by WatehRY. It features spikes with circular hitboxes, as opposed to the standard rectangular ones.

levels.name: Novae Project
levels.creator: BGames
levels.description: A sequel to the very early 2.2 level Tombstone Project, with a similar difficulty of gameplay but for a whole 3 minutes. Uses everyone's favorite song that is totally not overused no definitely not

levels.name: Plastic Flowers
levels.creator: procurador
levels.description: Very low object level consisting of gameplay centered around falling platforms and collecting keys. Infamous for the yellow pad timing as well as a stupidly tight cube timing. Watch out for spikes hidden behind flowers...

levels.name: radio tower
levels.creator: DavidConcal
levels.description: Similar to the Tower XXII, in which you climb a tower with very precise mini robot gameplay, but this one has no checkpoints. The ending is very easy to choke

levels.name: rimu
levels.creator: dpoopoop
levels.description: Electric facility themed level that plays like a jump king map. Each third has a gimmick to freshen things up; now with an added failsafe, so if you mess up, you wont lose that much progress anymore now.

levels.name: serenity
levels.creator: mag
levels.description: Tower needler with some #ChillVibez. Features plenty of moving platforms and pad jumps of many flavours!

levels.name: stormpunk
levels.creator: KingEggplant987
levels.description: Sequel to the easy demon "The lightning road" (not to be confused with the easy demon "THE LIGHTNING ROAD"). Stormy speedrun-autoscroller type level similar to its predecessor

levels.name: SUMMER
levels.creator: GHHH
levels.description: Autoscroller themed around summer—surprise surprise—with gameplay in the style of a classic level, given how much of it relies on clicksync.

levels.name: TASSAR
levels.creator: iIBonIi
levels.description: Explore a ruined world on a dangerous journey to save the fallen deity Tassar and free the world from the curse of greed inflicted by its inhabitants with a bat-like creature named Taurie by your side.

levels.name: Terminal Heaven
levels.creator: G4lvatron
levels.description: Indirect successor to G4lvatron's other platformer SpeedTek, with incredibly tricky slope jumps and cleverly glitchy area trigger effects

levels.name: The Sun
levels.creator: Xkahan
levels.description: Pure, unadulterated needle for 6 rooms with very few gimmicks, only a few visual obstructions in the later rooms. The last checkpoint might as well be invisible with how bright the sun is

levels.name: Tragedy in 5 acts
levels.creator: Ivelll
levels.description: Traverse 5 different areas with various gimmicks to reach the end of your journey. Could have been the first legendary plextreme with its multitude of legendary send but Rob opted for epic.

levels.name: Uh Oh
levels.creator: chloechu
levels.description: A remake of Uhm Huh with much more care put into it. A set of playtesters, no strange chokepoints, lower difficulty, and good balancing makes for a much better experience than the original.

levels.name: Verbogen
levels.creator: StyphonTV
levels.description: A standard slope boosting level in Styphon's signature style of deco. Features some mechanics also found in terminal heaven, such as single use orbs and arrow triggers. The slopes will never end...

levels.name: Waltervallum
levels.creator: walter22gd
levels.description: An Intervallum inspired level, and sequel to the Intersummisse inspired level by the same creator, Intervanmisse. Has a blend of standard robot jumps and a few more unconventional ones.

levels.name: Whats The Point
levels.creator: Crerro
levels.description: Lengthy speedrun level where you ascend a tower to escape a moving wall of spikes. Surprisingly lenient with its timer, but makes up for that by having much less forgiving gameplay

levels.name: 22 Trials of PAIN
levels.creator: sink
levels.description: Relatively easy platformer, made way harder than it needs to be by the combination of zero checkpoints and the last 2 rooms being an absurd spike in difficulty

levels.name: Aquanemesis
levels.creator: vLibra
levels.description: Deathless platformer that heavily relies on switches and moving objects. Features one part each at night and sunrise

levels.name: HOOKIN UP WITH CUSTI
levels.creator: Custi
levels.description: The Terminal Heaven of Custi's HOOKTEK, featuring a snowy mountain aesthetic and extremely precise hook maneuvers for 5 very short checkpoints

levels.name: HYPER GRAVITRON
levels.creator: exsii
levels.description: Recreation of the Super Gravitron from VVVVVV. Potentially coin list worthy, since you have to basically rebeat the level to get all 3, and the entire thing plays like a slot machine

levels.name: i wanna rob the top
levels.creator: Enlightenment
levels.description: Bowser's Castle level that has you go through 50 Rooms of increasing difficulty without dying once. Kill the child

levels.name: Ice Climbers
levels.creator: Smarted
levels.description: Formerly the hardest 9 moon, this level has tons of extremely tight timings and stupid hitboxes that lead you to believe it was hack-verified, similar to the creator's other (former) extreme demon

levels.name: Jimu
levels.creator: Laayte + more
levels.description: Yet another -imu level. This one takes on a space theme were you travel to different planets. Enjoy the beautiful flowers in the second zone before free-falling to the end in the third. Dont choke!

levels.name: LobaXmasTower
levels.creator: ThiKn
levels.description: Do you remember the tower at the end of LXE? Yeah, now you have to climb the inside of it and ring the bell at the top. The level is better known as LXT.

levels.name: LXE
levels.creator: ThiKn
levels.description: Super Meat Boy inspired Christmas level that came out in the middle of July for some reason. Features 15 rooms and a timed gift delivery sequence at the end, as well as double and wall jumps throughout the level.

levels.name: Mechanical Warehouse
levels.creator: iownfish
levels.description: 4 straight minutes of swing copter autoscroller in a deteriorating factory with lots of cycle gameplay and lots of traps with low raw difficulty throughout

levels.name: Platscapes
levels.creator: Xepheron
levels.description: Shardscapes but platformer mode. Features 3 sections each taking roughly a minute and 99% of the gameplay is just corner jumps in typical Shardscapes fashion.

levels.name: The Abyss
levels.creator: MadisonYuko
levels.description: Previously the hardest platformer, sporting an extremely long gauntlet of tricky timings and very dark deep-ocean deco

levels.name: The Observatory
levels.creator: iownfish
levels.description: The official sequel to Mechanical Warehouse. This level is a 3 and a half minute long pure memory avoidance that tests your brain power more than your timing capacity

levels.name: Zenith Of The Sky
levels.creator: blackdashh
levels.description: An extremely frustrating slope boosting level juxtaposed with pretty designs and a chill atmosphere that takes place in the sky. The last click looks like a form of torture and that's because it is

levels.name: CASIO HELLBURST
levels.creator: MVXgameS
levels.description: Remake of the SMW romhack Casio Mario World's final boss. To make up for being a short 1-room bossfight, it sports ridiculous hitboxes, unpredictable movement and aggressive lightning cycles

levels.name: fish in the sink
levels.creator: pumpkininabox
levels.description: Unconventional autoscroller where the objects move rather than the screen, forcing tons of micro adjustments. Collect Fish (specifically 35)

levels.name: GetFixedBoi
levels.creator: dewpidergaming
levels.description: The current hardest jump king level, inspired by the getfixedboi secret Terraria seed. Consists of slippery slopes that you have to land on the corner of for some jumps.

levels.name: Guidance
levels.creator: ThiKn
levels.description: Has a dreary, almost liminal atmosphere, shrouding the whole level in moody darkness. The gameplay is rather standard needle however

levels.name: Happy World
levels.creator: Cubical7
levels.description: Basic needle level with a ton of varying decoration, with nods to old (flash-)games and memes. You might not feel the happiest playing in this "Happy" World.

levels.name: Hidden Horizons
levels.creator: Orelu
levels.description: A fairly standard needle level with 5 sections that tell a story with an unclear meaning. Every section has 1 very minor gimmick that doesn't affect the gameplay that much

levels.name: Jetpack Trials
levels.creator: Eefy77
levels.description: 50 rooms of jetpack challenges with varying degrees of stupidity. As a result, this can take an absurdly long time to beat

levels.name: Life and Beauty
levels.creator: No ob
levels.description: Minecraft-themed platformer with almost invisible cube needle on top of the deco, rated 7 months after release and complete with pixel art mario getting griefed at the endscreen. so retro

levels.name: lost summary
levels.creator: sillymn
levels.description: You're on a trip through snowy mountains and come across a shed to sleep in. Your dreams are rather questionable. The second screen of each checkpoint is the most annoying.

levels.name: NIGHT RUNNER
levels.creator: newSakePlayS
levels.description: A super tight speedrun level taking place in an urban area at night. Features a unique way of forcing the player to be fast by having a bunch of mini timers rather than one over-arching timer

levels.name: 3x3
levels.creator: TestFiles
levels.description: As the name would suggest, this entire level takes place in a 3x3 box, where obstacles change with each trophy you collect. Complete every iteration within the 56 second time limit to win

levels.name: Adrenaline
levels.creator: IvanCrafter026
levels.description: Rainbow colored NIGHT RUNNER-esque speedrun level. Features less turnarounds than its nighttime counterpart but the base gameplay is significantly harder to compensate

levels.name: AVALANCHE
levels.creator: Emariiii
levels.description: A fast paced trip down a snowy mountain with a high avalanche risk. Features lots of strange ice slope tech similar to that found in the "Frozen Cave" section of Robot King

levels.name: Blocktober Casino
levels.creator: DavidConcal
levels.description: A long deathless blocktober styled level with 4 sections, 1 for each suit of cards. The level starts in a casino and ends with you winning the jackpot. LET'S GO GAMBLING!!!

levels.name: cabbit
levels.creator: dpoopoop
levels.description: A Celeste inspired dash orb level incorporating remade Celeste gimmicks like the golden feather and Kevins. Named after the cute cat + rabbit hybrid.

levels.name: CONVEYOR
levels.creator: Keleru & dkitey
levels.description: An extremely learny level based around... well, conveyors. Gameplay mostly consists of arrow triggers and speed control.

levels.name: Crerro Kaizo I
levels.creator: Crerro
levels.description: The first level in the Crerro Kaizo series, and currently no longer the only rated one. Harder than it looks due to abnormal hitboxes and memorization. Ends with two frame perfects (i think)

levels.name: depth
levels.creator: kwezy & zeddok
levels.description: Like the name would imply, you are deep underground and have to climb out. The coin makes the level dark. Verified by Whizkid05 for some reason

levels.name: ECT6 KOHTAKT
levels.creator: itzCybercube
levels.description: Speedrun level that seems to be corrupted and glitchy, testing how fast you can do gameplay with every gamemode available before it breaks completely

levels.name: Exaltation
levels.creator: thejshadow
levels.description: Surprisingly unambitious thejshadow level albeit still in his atmospheric pixel style. Conceived as a spiritual sequel to Terminal Heaven with longer checkpoints and more nuanced timings.

levels.name: Fluxion
levels.creator: TestFiles
levels.description: Room-based level with a life system and a rogue-like mechanic that adds new obstacles each time you clear the room, and you must do this 25 times in a row. Every copy of Fluxion is personalized...

levels.name: Free Solo
levels.creator: meowmasterer & Cejelost
levels.description: Extremely punishing and relatively short for its difficulty. Has really pretty nature themed decoration and ends with a cute completion cutscene

levels.name: HALL OF THE HOOKKING
levels.creator: Custi
levels.description: The third level of Custi's hook series, this time taking place in the hall of the Hook King. Has 9 places for checkpoints, but you can only choose 4 to use. Ends with a fight against the Hook King.

levels.name: Meisou Hanabi
levels.creator: TheSac9009
levels.description: A rainbow-colored level with features characteristic of IWBTG fangame avoidances such as randomized bullet patterns, bouncing bullets, and a vocaloid on the opposite side of the screen for some reason.

levels.name: Nuclear Alarm
levels.creator: GabestGD
levels.description: This level uses a gimmick where you have 10 checkpoints you can place at will, using every gamemode and being surprisingly balanced. Caused RobTop to rant about needle gameplay even though this isnt even a goddamn needle level

levels.name: SCORCHING LANDSCAPE
levels.creator: newSakePlayS
levels.description: A much harder sequel to NIGHT RUNNER, despite having no spikes. Clocks often only have a window of <0.1 seconds to collect, so you have to ensure that you're doing everything perfectly

levels.name: Stickerbush Symphony
levels.creator: mariokirby1703 & iownfish
levels.description: An extremely faithful remake of "Bramble Scramble" by Crerro. The gameplay wasn't changed much, just rebalanced with added Stingers flying about the level.

levels.name: the guards mission
levels.creator: 2ItalianCats
levels.description: An extremely long level, with edited completions taking around 20 - 25 minutes. Split into 9 zones which are all mostly unrelated to each other. Player 2 canonically dies. 0️⃣

levels.name: unwell
levels.creator: No ob & tokei
levels.description: You've fallen into the ocean after your raft broke and now you have to find your way back to the surface. Features a mix of standard needle and more unorthodox gameplay throughout

levels.name: Whg3 Lv5
levels.creator: FakeHATETAG
levels.description: A recreation of level 5 of World's Hardest Game 3, using actual 4 way movement with 2 player controls rather than jetpack

levels.creator: No ob
levels.description: The "second" I wanna be the guy fangame rate after "Not Sunspike". This level features an almost flawless recreation of iwbtg's physics with decoration mostly consisting of lines and text symbols.

levels.name: Aerios
levels.creator: Orelu
levels.description: A Shovel Knight inspired level with some fairly standard gameplay. Originally rejected from The Platformer List for micro-clicks but was updated to be less reliant on them. Beware of The Buddies™

levels.name: Ascension Tower
levels.creator: Cubical7
levels.description: Yet another needle tower. Climb up 5 layers of extremely tight gameplay to reach heaven. Each layer has 2 checkpoints except the last since we can't have nice things apparently.

levels.name: Champions Road
levels.creator: iYene and StarDisaster
levels.description: Low gravity tower level with lots of shaders and lots of cycle gameplay. Consists mostly of cube, robot, and jetpack, with 1 ball part close to the end.

levels.name: Cognitive Overload
levels.creator: TestFiles
levels.description: 20 minigames of various difficulties that appear on screen over a period of 4 minutes, with each minigame having its own time limit. Controls are very learny and unintuitive.

levels.name: Estufa
levels.creator: Samamba
levels.description: Downscroller level with some memory elements, randomized avoidances in between sections, and a very copyrighted song. Generally very well received.

levels.name: Feverest Dream
levels.creator: dewpidergaming
levels.description: Do you like slopes? Do you like being on drugs? Then this is the level for you. Oh, and don't try nightmare mode, you'll regret it...

levels.name: forgotten veil
levels.creator: Ultramouk
levels.description: The first level imitating the physics from "Everybody Edits", featuring absolutely nonsensical gameplay with some of the most compressed difficulty ever seen.

levels.name: Fulmination
levels.creator: IvanCrafter026
levels.description: Very hard rainbow-themed speedrun level and Adrenaline's "big brother", featuring more variation and much harder gameplay with even tighter timers.

levels.name: Heartbeat
levels.creator: MadisonYuko
levels.description: Love themed autoscroller that has mostly needle gp spliced with quite a few microclicks. Has the most predictable creator/song combo possible.

levels.name: Heavenly Echo
levels.creator: IplmaI
levels.description: Yet another speedrun level in the same vein as NIGHT RUNNER, this time with a heaven theme. Plays quite jank and it doesn't seem like many people want to beat this :c can place now.

levels.name: Intervallum
levels.creator: MaddyGMD
levels.description: A fairly short but extremely punishing deathless Celeste inspired level. Most of the spikes are mini spikes, although you only have to land on the corners of them twice

levels.name: Pointless Park
levels.creator: FakeHATETAG
levels.description: A compressed difficulty cube only level with... timewarp that makes it faster.. and.. arrow triggers.. and uses An Abyssal Odyssey as the song- haven't we seen this before? Oh, wait. This one's weirder. Carry on.

levels.name: SWAP CORE
levels.creator: YoStarYeahya
levels.description: The ultimate blink block level, this level sports 10 rooms of fast paced swapping kill blocks, followed by a bossfight. Was an open verification for months before finally being verified

levels.name: the coldest place
levels.creator: iownfish
levels.description: Deathless level abusing ice physics set in a wintery mountain setting. Wait at the hand or the saw thats chasing you (in typical iownfish fashion) in the last section will be faster.

levels.name: Void World
levels.creator: MadisonYuko
levels.description: The sequel to The Abyss, sporting a similar decoration style except everything is purple, above water, and it's raining. The difficulty is carried by the first checkpoint

levels.name: Xenolith
levels.creator: Xepheron
levels.description: A little adventure through a mountain, lava caverns and a sky temple packed with various diagonals to check your needle skills. Hopefully you dont choke at the end.

levels.name: Chaos Ball Theory
levels.creator: DustyBud
levels.description: A recreation of Circle Pong using the planets in our solar system that gets increasingly harder as it goes on. Do not abbreviate the level name...

levels.name: Crerro Kaizo II
levels.creator: Crerro
levels.description: The second level in the Crerro Kaizo series. Like its predecessor, it's an autoscroller deathless platformer with a lot to remember, but this one is more difficult, balanced, and well-received

levels.name: Dead Of Night
levels.creator: TMco
levels.description: A long awaited extremely long level started over a year before being released. Features a double jump for all gamemodes (except jetpack) and fixed hitboxes fucking everywhere. Fortnite Part

levels.name: Lava Trials II
levels.creator: LikeGG
levels.description: The sequel to the old 2.2 GDPS top 1 "Lava Trials." Features a few checkpoints with various gimmicks, such as beat blocks, slope boosting, dash orbs, and rising lava taken to the extreme.

levels.name: Lets All Love Lain
levels.creator: MadisonYuko
levels.description: Deathless autoscroller (who would've guessed) that starts with a 60 second arthritis inducing jetpack cutscene before launching you into a glitchy electrical disaster. You WILL NOT fluke this.

levels.name: Medramint
levels.creator: vLibra
levels.description: Standard pixel style level where you climb a snowy mountain. Features a unique style of gameplay with very few named jumps and a 4K Ultra-Realistic background that will lag even the strongest of PCs

levels.name: Nuh Uh
levels.creator: Chloe
levels.description: Verify the level to get Gecko to send it! Modeled after Uhm Huh, incorporating the defining characteristics of low gravity gameplay, square hitboxes, and a short timer

levels.name: Project BUZZKILL
levels.creator: Superkobster
levels.description: Nearly 2 minutes of pure jetpack memory where the player acts as a test subject in a room with many moving objects. The gameplay is not at all forgiving, either

levels.name: The Capital
levels.creator: JellyPPG
levels.description: Celeste-themed level that starts out fairly normal but gets trippier as it goes on. Takes place in the White House. That last sentence was a lie I am really sorry

levels.name: Trouncy Ball
levels.creator: lappwv
levels.description: Sequel to the "beloved" Bouncy Ball, now featuring an awkward 2 player drawing gimmick. Initially thought to be hack verified but was later revealed to authentically suck

levels.name: We Forgot Everything
levels.creator: FakeHATETAG
levels.description: An emotionally charged autoscroller with genius song representation and unique gameplay ideas. Near-universally praised as one of the best platformer extremes in the game

levels.name: WRISTS UNTIED
levels.creator: No ob
levels.description: Jetpack Autoscroller much like "i loved you" by the same creator. Can be seen as a sequel but wasn't intended to be. Fly through tight gaps while listening to this kinda deep song.

levels.name: Yimu
levels.creator: mariokirby1703
levels.description: The hardest imu to date, containing brutal aerial movements and lots of orb timings. The second part is inspired by Super Mario Galaxy 2's Upside Dizzy Galaxy!

levels.name: Crime And Punishment
levels.creator: itzCybercube + more
levels.description: Kasane Teto!!!!!!!!! (wacky and glitchy styled autoscroller spanning roughly 2 minutes, equipped with unconventional gameplay, high cps, and even a full recreation of the wave gamemode for plat)

levels.name: HEAVIER METAL
levels.creator: Samamba & more
levels.description: One of the hardest platformer megacollabs, and sequel to the (forever) unrated level "heavy metal." Rooms are loosely themed around metal. Carried mostly by the overgrown checkpoint

levels.name: im happy 4 you
levels.creator: No ob
levels.description: Art styled level featuring only flying gamemodes. Starts out at dawn, then goes into the afternoon, then the evening. Makes you go in a bunch of super tight spike gaps

levels.name: Null
levels.creator: RealMatter
levels.description: The former hardest rated platformer, and despite its incredibly short length, it is incredibly difficult. There is no room for error, and every jump is incredibly tight. Good luck

levels.name: r a g e
levels.creator: setfu and TheUpgrater
levels.description: Brightly colored deathless climb level with gameplay revolving around coyote jumps and unconventional 1 block gap jumps, including the particularly nefarious "hook jump" at the halfway mark.

levels.name: Rabbit Hole
levels.creator: MadisonYuko
levels.description: Hatsune Miku!!!!!!!!! (autoscroller with a shitload of hitbox abuse, even more so than the average level this hard)

levels.name: Starlight Cyclone
levels.creator: TNTking531
levels.description: A Celeste inspired deathless mini-jetpack gauntlet featuring square fixed hitboxes, death orbs, and moving objects inside a giant tornado.

levels.name: Uhm Huh
levels.creator: Crerro
levels.description: Speedbuilt speedrun level that got speedrated. Stupidly tight low gravity gameplay with a ton of tight clicks and gaps with very unforgiving hitboxes, which must be done in under 44 seconds

levels.name: vortex
levels.creator: FakeHATETAG
levels.description: Dark double jump platformer where you have to collect little vortexes to clear the way and open paths. Involves many extremely tight spike gaps and nasty mid-air turnarounds. Good luck with this one.

levels.name: dish rags
levels.creator: MaddyGMD
levels.description: A raw and emotionally charged autoscroller made as a passion project for the platformer community. Took over 4 months to get its first victor.

levels.name: glungus
levels.creator: dpoopoop
